ogTitle: Sefton Park vs Sellicks Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sefton Park and Sellicks Hill.
heading: Sefton Park vs Sellicks Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sefton Park, South Australia and Sellicks Hill, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sellicks Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Sefton Park (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sefton Park or Sellicks Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sefton Park has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Sellicks Hill scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sefton Park scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Sellicks Hill scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sefton Park or Sellicks Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sellicks Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
